name: @doquflow/cli
description: CLI for setting up Docuflow in your project
author: Docuflow <hello@doquflows.dev>

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),src=p.join(process.cwd(),'../ui/dist'),dst=p.join(process.cwd(),'ui-dist');if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.log('Warning: packages/ui/dist not found — run npm run build:ui first');process.exit(0)}fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('  ✓ ui-dist synced from packages/ui/dist ('+(fs.readdirSync(dst).length)+' files at root)')"
